title: Azure DevOps Integration
excerpt:
Hello! 
We are trying to integrate the Azure DevOps plugin into our Monday.com boards. Can anyone share potential pit falls we should avoid, or any success stories? Any and all information is appreciated. 
Thanks!

posts.author: JanieKustaborder (Janie Kustaborder)

posts.cookedHtml: How did this work out for you? The Monday/Azure DevOps Integration? Anything you can share?
